title: Bihar Police BPSSC Havildar Clerk Home Guard Admit Card 2026
short_information: Bihar Police Subordinate Services Commission BPSSC has released the advertisement Havildar Clerk (From Bihar Home Guard) in Bihar Home Guard under Home Dept. (Special), Govt. of Bihar . Those Candidates Are Interested with BPSSC Havildar Clerk Home Guard Can Download the Admit Card. For other information related to Bihar Police Havildar Clerk Home Guard Advt No 02/2026 recruitment like age limit, qualification, pay scale and all other information read the advertisement and then apply. Bihar Police Subordinate Services Commission BPSSC Bihar Home Guard Havildar Clerk Recruitment 2026 BPSSC Advt No. 02/2026 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / OBC / EWS / EBC : 100/- SC / ST : 100/- All Category Female : 100/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking BPSSC Bihar Home Guard Havildar Clerk
eligibility: Havildar Clerk Superintendent Clerk, Home Guard (including players receiving daily duty allowance) 64 Post 10+2 Intermediate Exam Passed More Eligibility Details Read the Notification. BPSSC Bihar Home Guard Havildar Clerk Exam 2026: Category Wise

text_sections.section: How to Fill BPSSC Bihar Home Guard Havildar Clerk Recruitment Online Form 2026
text_sections.content: BPSSC Bihar Home Guard Havildar Clerk Recruitment for Various Post Candidate Can Apply Between 05/01/2026 to 05/02/2026 | Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in BPSSC Bihar Home Guard Havildar Clerk Recruitment 2026. | Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. | If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. | Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
